title: juncus × oronensis
intro: Juncus × oronensis, also known as Orson's rush, is a hybrid plant species within the Juncaceae family, combining the characteristics of Juncus bufonius and Juncus conglomeratus. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots and stems, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The roots of Juncus × oronensis are used in herbal preparations to help alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, providing several health benefits. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a valuable component in traditional herbal medicine.
